violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw hamburger and steak were above ready to eat foods in the fridge on the cook line.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Tin foil placed under the flattop is not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Areas behind the gill and underneath the cooking equipment on the cooking line need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Boxes of single-use items were on the floor in the dry storage area.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Carboard sheets on the ground in the dry storage are not nonabsorbent or easily cleanable.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Ceiling in the dish area are peeling and are not easily cleanable. Missing/broken tiles on the cook line floor.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
